narrative:
Cols 79-C (precinct in Franklin County) has 1,401 registered voters, with 58.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.3%, a narrow Republican lean of 0.9 percentage points.
